## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence summary -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Add tool(s)
- [ ] Fix data (URL, description, logo, tags)
- [ ] New category or subcategory
- [ ] UI / code change
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `make validate` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `make build` compiles cleanly
- [ ] Logo is `.webp` in `public/logos/` (if adding a logo)
- [ ] Description is one sentence, ≤80 chars, no trailing period
- [ ] All tags resolve in `tags.yaml`
